        if let Some(s) = self.overrides.get(ext) {
            return Arc::clone(s);
        }
        if let Some(s) = self.defaults.get(ext) {
            return Arc::clone(s);
        }
        Arc::clone(&self.fallback)

pub fn new(fallback: Arc<dyn ChunkingStrategy>) -> Self {
        Self {
            defaults: HashMap::new(),
            overrides: HashMap::new(),
            fallback,
        }
    }
